pages.text: Ordinary endersents no longer satisfy you. You thought of the four named endersents you witnessed in the End Eternity, and drew inspiration from them. You can infuse a book with void echoes containing void power, which can then be given to your endersents to grant them greater power — bestowed with "eyes".
The power of this special enchanted book is very unstable; you cannot decide which type of "eye" is stored within.
